# mtncloud_ipv4_ip_pool (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud IPv4 address pool by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_ipv4_ip_pool" "app" {
  name = "app-pool"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the IP pool to look up.

### Read-Only

- `gateway` (String) Gateway IP address for the pool.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the IP pool.
- `netmask` (String) Netmask for the pool.
